title: Reelo Baruk

{{Quote|He claims to be an honest garbage hauler, but he's really one of the most powerful criminal kingpins in all of Nar Shaddaa—even the Hutts won't touch him.|[[Kyle Katarn]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|audio=HonestReelo.flac|<ref name="JO" />}}
'''Reelo Baruk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] gangster from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|In the flesh, but who are you?|Reelo to [[Kyle Katarn]]|audio=ReeloInTheFlesh.flac|<ref name="JO" />}}
[[File:Reelo_Baruk.jpg|thumb|left|Baruk while working for Jabba the Hutt]]
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Baruk was working for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Living in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], his job was to hire spacers to eliminate Jabba's enemies, such as the [[Alkhara Bandits]] or the [[Valarian Syndicate|Valarians]].<ref name="SWG:JPRB" /> There, he also contacted a local [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to deal with Jabba's [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] problem.<ref name="SWGTCG" />

Baruk eventually moved to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], and opened a [[Baruk's Bar|bar]] and also began his own criminal empire. Most people just saw him as the head of a [[Reelo Baruk's Garbage Processing Facility|local garbage-hauling company]], but this was not the case. He worked very hard to keep his criminal activity under the radar. His thugs were of many different alien species, and were considered some of the worst scum in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="JO" /> Even though he wasn't a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], he managed to become one of the most respected crime lords in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], but kept his business covered up enough that even [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] believed him to be legitimate.<ref name="NRIR">{{LucasArts|url=products/outcast/html/spin.html|text=N.R.I. Reports|int=N.R.I. Reports}}</ref>

===Businessbeing===
In the years leading to [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] had no evidence about Baruk's criminal activities, seemingly turning to clean business. He operated a [[Reelo Baruk's Garbage Processing Facility|company]] for garbage hauling and disposal, and managed to register it officially with the Republic, something that would make him the only legitimate business man on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shadda]].<ref name="NRIR" />

During the [[Empire Reborn]] crisis, he made a deal with the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Desann]], and former [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] reported some vague criminal activity in his former City, but his pleas were ignored by the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]], and [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] found nothing about his claims. Eventually Baruk's company started serving the [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]--a curious move since the City always recycled its garbage for fuel.<ref name="NRIR" /> In reality he was supplying the [[Imperial Remnant]] with thugs for a [[Battle of Bespin (Empire Reborn)|takeover]] of the [[Carbon-freezing/Legends|carbonite freezing chambers]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

===Last stand===
[[File:Reelogun.jpg|thumb|Reelo shortly before his death]]
While [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Empire Reborn)|looking for him]] in Nar Shaddaa, [[Kyle Katarn]] discovered [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in Baruk's hold and eventually found the crime lord. Baruk managed to entrap him in a [[Reelo Baruk's hideout|room]] full of [[Autoturret/Legends|autoturrets]], but the Jedi escaped and freed Lando.<ref name="JO" />

While Katarn and Calrissian were about to escape from Nar Shaddaa, Baruk attacked the two men with a handful of mercenaries. The criminal leader used his thugs to board the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']], but Katarn killed them all. When the ship was about to depart it malfunctioned, and Reelo and more of his thugs, in a desperate attempt, attacked with Baruk using a gun platform. But Katarn jumped into the laser turret of the ship and shot them all down, including Baruk.<ref name="JO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Reelo first appeared as one of the more major villains in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'', where his voice was portrayed by [[Kevin Michael Richardson]]. Reelo later appeared in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', as the entrance point to the Jabba The Hutt quests.
